title: The Colosseum
short: Ancient amphitheatre in Rome, used for games and public events.

title: The Roman Forum
short: The central public space in ancient Rome, used for various activities.

title: Trevi Fountain
short: Famous Baroque fountain in Rome, known for its stunning architecture.

title: Vittorio Emanuele II Monument
short: Monument dedicated to the first king of unified Italy.

title: Statue of David
short: Sculpture by Michelangelo, representing the biblical hero David.

title: San Gimignano
short: Medieval town in Tuscany, known for its towers and architecture.

title: Saint Peter's basilica
short: The worlds biggest church known for its famous paintings and architecture.

title: Saint Marks Square
short: city centre in Venice, known for its tourist destination and famous restaurants.

title: Doges Palace
short: Doge palace in Venice, known for its stunning architecture and historical significance.

title: Saint Marks Basilica
short: Basilica in Venice, known for its stunning architecture and mosaics.

title: Leaning Tower of Pisa
short: Famous leaning bell tower in Pisa, known for its unintended tilt.

title: The Cathedral of Pisa
short: Gothic cathedral in Pisa, known for its stunning architecture.
